arts.ttl: 'Not what we expect' - Arne Slot issues Liverpool players warning over Premier League title advantage
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has spoken about the Premier League title race ahead of Wednesday's visit of Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot explains why he went public with his criticism of Darwin Nunez after tearing into the striker's 'behaviour' that he 'can't accept'
arts.sum: The Dutchman singled out the Uruguayan after the Reds' 2-2 draw against Aston Villa last week, when he missed an open goal late in the match.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot tactically outclasses Pep Guardiola: Is Liverpool manager best in the Premier League after Manchester City win?
arts.sum: Liverpool beat Manchester City 2-0 last Sunday and boss Arne Slot's tactical brilliance arguably makes him the best manager in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: International manager brands Liverpool attacker a "failure" amid rumours of a snub for March's fixtures
arts.sum: Italy head coach Luciano Spalletti labels Federico Chiesa's move to Liverpool a "failure" amid reports he will snub the attacker in his squad for the March internationals.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Slot 'can't accept' Núñez's work rate
arts.sum: Arne Slot has explained his frustrations with Darwin Núñez after he left the Uruguay international on the bench during Liverpool's 2-0 win over Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Former defender claims Anfield return would be a "dream"
arts.sum: Brentford defender Sepp van den Berg goes on the record to state his ambition of returning to Liverpool, just over six months after leaving the club.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot gives Liverpool squad Mo Salah warning about standards in Premier League race
arts.sum: Arne Slot doesn't want to see any drop in standards from his Liverpool side as they head towards winning English title No 20 this season

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains public criticism of Darwin Nunez and Liverpool star's response
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has discussed why he was so critical of Darwin Nunez following his missed chance against Aston Villa last week ahead of the Reds' clash with Newcastle

arts.ttl: Monday Night Club: Liverpool's contract dilemmas
arts.sum: The Monday Night Club's Mark Chapman, Rory Smith, Paul Robinson and Chris Sutton discuss forward Mohamed Salah's contract situation at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals reasons behind Darwin Nunez criticism after ‘unacceptable’ behaviour
arts.sum: The Liverpool boss was not impressed with Nunez’s work-rate against Wolves and Aston Villa
